goal: eval ep_length >= 400 on tomato soup can @ 5N (deterministic, 5 eps)

experiments.result: eval=24.8 @300k, training ep_len=30.8 still rising, RETRY
eval=18.2 @300k, FAIL — worse than baseline. C3 resolved: n_steps=512 wins.
eval=17.6 @150k (1N force), 1N behaves same as 5N — force NOT primary bottleneck
eval=25.8 @150k (5N fine-tune on 1N warm-start), modest +1 over exp1 at same budget, RETRY
PARTIAL (killed at 150k by tmux window kill). eval ep_len 16–20 with force=0 — confirms drop is policy-induced not force-induced. FAIL vs 25.8 target, but informative negative.
experiments.claim_tested: C5 (implicit: force IS the bottleneck — rejected)

experiments.result: SUCCESS. eval ep_len 100.2 ± 24.6 @ 275k (vs prior best 25.8); training rollout 127.7 still rising at 300k. Breakthrough at ~200k steps. Survival-bonus hypothesis validated.

C1.statement: PPO + 45D obs can learn to hold better than random, given enough gradient updates
C1.reason: exp5 eval ep_len 100.2 @ 275k (5x baseline), training 127.7 still rising. Gradient updates alone weren't enough — survival bonus was the unlock.

C2.statement: Curriculum on force_mag (low -> high) reaches target ep_length faster than fixed-force
C2.reason: exp3 curriculum: 25.8 vs exp1's 24.8 at same 300k budget (+4%). Modest benefit. Phase A (1N) performed same as 5N, reducing expected C2 advantage.

C3.statement: n_steps=512 or 1024 beats n_steps=2048 within 300k step budget
C3.reason: exp1 (n_steps=512) = 24.8 beats exp2 (n_steps=1024) = 18.2 and sanity-01 (n_steps=2048) = 19.8. Use n_steps=512.

C4.statement: Lower INTERP_STEPS_PER_KF increases fps without hurting grasp stability
C4.reason: All experiments hit 26-30 fps stably. Reset speed not a bottleneck.

key_finding: Survival bonus (+0.1/step) broke the ~25-step ceiling. Eval ep_len climbed from flat ~20 (25k-150k) to 100.2 at 275k. Training rollout still rising at 300k. Reward shaping was the primary unlock — not gradient budget, not force curriculum. Retention penalty is now over-dominant at long horizons (reward decreases as ep_len increases), next tuning target.
